cards.back: Variables that are manipulated by the experimenter to test their effect on the outcome of an experiment
The variable being manipulated or changed by the experimenter to test its effect on the outcome of an experiment
The variable being measured or observed in response to changes made to the independent variable
The process of randomly assigning participants or units to different groups or conditions to reduce bias and increase the validity of the results
A technique used to control for extraneous variables by dividing participants or units into blocks based on a variable that is not being manipulated
